DEF MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE (PC 1538,5), FILED
/CAL: TRIAL, LD 01-31-22, SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT PENDING FROM 12-17-21/VD: LD 01-31-22 AND TRIAL/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:10000/BWNUM:1ST/NIGHTSERV/

/CAL:CUSTODY STATUS, LD 01-31-22/DAWT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALLTERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THATTIME,/DEF:CHECK IN WITH ACM 5X PER WEEK, 3X IN PERSON AND 2X BY PHONE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:THE 01-14-22 TRIAL IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/SHER/BAIL:5000/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG//PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 01-31-22/TE:2 WEEKS/CONTD: STATUS OF M99 21011922 AND TRIAL/DOP/

/CAL: CONCLUSION OF BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN: CULLEN ROCHE, SFPD/X: IN RESPONSE TO DEFENSE OBJECTION, THE COURT HOLDS AN IN CAMERA HEARING RE ASSERTION OF WITNESS PRIVILEGE,/X: AFTER A BRIEF HEARING, THE DEFENSE OBJECTION IS OVERRULED AND THE WITNESS MAY ASSERT THE STATED PRIVILEGE,/CAL: PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/  /HTA1: 1, 2, 3,4/ORPJ/CONTD: ARRAIGNMENT ON THE INFORMATION/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/INTC/X: ANDREW PEREZ APPEARS WITH WARREN HENDERSON FROM THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'SOFFICE/X: BENJAMINMERCER-GOLDEN APPEARS WITH ALEEM RAJAS FROM THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE/WIT SWORN: OFFICER CULLEN ROCHE SFPD/X: SPANISH INTERPRETER CARLA CUEVAS TOOK OVER TRANSLATION FROM ELIZABETH MCCARTHY AT 3:20PM/EXHMA: PP1 NARCOTICSENVELOPE CONTAINING SMALLER INDIVIDUAL PACKAGES CONTAINING SUSPECTED NARCOTICS/DEFT WV CPX/CONTD:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/

/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/INTC/X: BENJAMIN MERCER-GOLDEN APPEARS WITH NUHA ABUSAMBRA FROM THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE/X: THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO GO PASS THE 10TH DAY FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/CONT/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/X: CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT, ANDREW PEREZ, APPEARINGUNDER THE SUPERVISION OFSAM BECKERMAN FROM THE DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OFFICE,//X: CERTIFIED LAW STUDENT, BENJAMIN MERCER-GOLDEN, APPEARING UNDER THE SUPERVISION OF NUAH ABUSAMRA FROM THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE,/TEXT:DEFT ENTNG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 10-29-21 (10TH)/X: THE 60TH LAST DAY IS 12-14-21,/SA2: ELLIS ST & HYDE ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1,5 HOURS/
